positive: A highly detailed watercolor illustration of a forest floor, featuring glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, delicate ferns, and woodland fairies. Cottagecore aesthetic, soft pastel colors, botanical drawing style, concept art, by Studio Ghibli and Beatrix Potter.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, digital painting, harsh lines, grayscale
